overview: A strategy-analysis dashboard that parses TradingView alert-log CSVs and runs the Brutus Playbook Bollinger Band strategy to surface trade setups, filters, and analytics.
features: Upload or load a sample TradingView alert-log CSV and parse it robustly
Compute derived 9-period RSI and Bollinger basis per asset and timeframe
Classify every band touch as snapback or push-through with MTF alignment
Apply minutes-into-bar, bandWidth volatility, and session filters
Surface trade setups with dynamic exit ladders across a dashboard and signals feed
Configure all strategy parameters in a settings panel that re-runs live
Read the full methodology on a strategy explainer page
